title: Easter Symbols & Emojis: Copy & Paste 🐰 🥚 ✝ Spring Festive
meta_description: Easter symbols and emojis — bunnies, eggs, chicks, crosses, and spring flowers for cards, captions, and bios. Click any Easter symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Bunnies, eggs, chicks, crosses, and spring greeting combos. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Easter symbols cover two springs at once: the egg-hunt side with bunnies, chicks, and chocolate, and the faith side with crosses, doves, and church services. This page brings together the Easter emoji and Unicode characters people copy for greeting cards, Sunday captions, school newsletters, and family group chats — plus one-click Happy Easter combos ready to paste anywhere.

sections.label: Bunnies & Eggs
sections.intro: The egg hunt essentials — rabbits, eggs, baskets, and chocolate.

sections.label: Chicks & Lambs
sections.intro: New-life animals that belong to the season — chicks at every stage, lambs, and butterflies.

sections.label: Faith
sections.intro: Respectful characters for the Christian heart of Easter — crosses, churches, and doves.

sections.label: Spring
sections.intro: Tulips, blossoms, and bright skies for fresh spring captions.

sections.label: Easter Combos
sections.intro: Ready-made spring greetings and decorations — each button copies the whole combo string at once.
